files.purpose: Sample JSON database containing initialized file assets, folder models, collections records and system activity logs.
JSON manifest mapping each modular file inside the Explorer digital assets platform to its corresponding architectural purpose.
Markdown design document detailing file structures and core code separations across the front-end SPA workspace.
REST API documentation outlining the simulated clientsiderest-endpoints and service data handlers.
Methodology document mapping every single logic helper, state reducer, and hook method to its operational goal.
Core TypeScript interfaces and enums representing files, folders, log histories, and state definitions.
Helper logic for storage calculations, byte sizing formatting, type charts mapper, and state persistence wrapper.
Pure functional operations modifying folders and files, supporting child folder collections and drag operations.
Utility business logic to handle breadcrumbs, simulated search filters, chronological log triggers, and MIME type detectors.
Encapsulated Custom state React Hook managing all asset storage interactions, effects, and modal toggles with zero rendering markup.
Visual design navigation container containing navigation menu, quotas block, and create actions triggers.
Visualization component representing storage capacity via interactive circular SVG progress ring.
Primary landing dashboard showing search hero, storage stats, dynamic file charts comparisons, and recent items.
Asset browsing view supporting folder navigation, dynamic list/grid toggles, and multi-file interactive grids.
Interactive folder button supporting native HTML5 drop zone highlights to relocate inner files.
Interactive file button with options drawer to toggle stars, trigger deletes, or invoke preview layers.
Visual timeline log component representing file actions chronologically.
Simulated drag and drop upload overlay, accepting drag-and-drops directly from user OS file explorers.
Modal containing form inputs to create folders.
Overlay modal containing bespoke interactive preview modules based on document, sheet or image type.
Settings menu containing database purges and simulated configurations blocks.
General layout assembly mapping top navigations, global search, view routing, and modals rendering.
